rules.title: Potential DLL Injection Or Execution Using Tracker.exe
rules.condition_summary: all of selection_* excluding 1 of filter_*
rules.description: Detects potential DLL injection and execution using "Tracker.exe

rules.title: Renamed ZOHO Dctask64 Execution
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding 1 of filter_main_*

rules.title: Renamed Mavinject.EXE Execution
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding exclusion filter
rules.description: Detects the execution of a renamed version of the "Mavinject" process. Which can be abused to perform process injection using the "/INJECTRUNNING" flag

rules.title: HackTool - Potential CobaltStrike Process Injection
rules.description: Detects a potential remote threat creation with certain characteristics which are typical for Cobalt Strike beacons

rules.title: Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding exclusion filter
rules.description: Detects process injection using the signed Windows tool "Mavinject" via the "INJECTRUNNING" flag
